strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, meeting the tenure requirement
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, demonstrating direct engagement with current AI tooling
Demonstrated entrepreneurial track record through founding GISCollective and shipping multiple open-source projects, aligning with the intrapreneurial profile the role seeks
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — limited to a 6-month staff engineer engagement with no machine learning background, no published AI research, and no AI products built at scale
No evidence of director-level individual contributor scope: no strategic customer advisory work, no external thought leadership, and no demonstrated influence over organizational or product strategy
Currently in a career gap with the most relevant AI role lasting only 6 months, raising questions about depth of specialization and readiness for a principal-level AI strategy position
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine technical breadth and an entrepreneurial disposition, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor who can shape AI strategy, advise enterprise customers, and serve as a recognized external expert in cloud and AI — none of which are substantiated by his resume. His AI involvement is confined to a brief period of MCP tooling work with no prior machine learning background, no advanced degree in a related field, and no demonstrated thought leadership at scale. The gap between his profile as a skilled senior-to-staff software craftsman and the strategic, advisory, and evangelism-heavy scope of this position is significant.
